uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: battery 0x64=10.0V; temp raw 2350=0x092E -> 23.5 C; humidity raw 5500=0x157C -> 55.00 %; wind-speed raw 320=0x0140 -> 3.20 m/s. Raw decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 23.5, Humidity 55, WindSpeed 3.2).

uplink.description: 0x0C report, negative temperature, low battery, wind-speed probe absent
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: byte3 0x83 -> low-battery flag set, battery (0x83 & 0x7F)=3 -> 0.3V; temp raw 0xFDF3 (two's-complement -525) -> -5.25 C; humidity raw 4000=0x0FA0 -> 40.00 %; wind-speed 0xFFFF -> NoSensor, omitted. Raw decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature -5.25, Humidity 40, WindSpeed NoSensor).

Synthetic in-bounds frame: battery 0x64=10.0V; CO2 raw 6500=0x1964 -> 650.0 ppm; NH3 and Noise channels 0xFFFF -> NoSensor, dropped (unmodelled). Raw decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (CO2 650).

Synthetic in-bounds frame: battery 0x64=10.0V; wind-direction raw 180=0x00B4 -> 180 deg; atmosphere 32-bit raw 101325=0x00018BCD /100 -> 1013.25 hPa (in 900-1100 bound). Raw decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (WindDirection 180, Atomsphere 1013.25).
Synthetic in-bounds frame: battery 0x64=10.0V; VOC raw 125=0x007D /10 -> 12.5 (camelCase extra, no vocabulary key). Raw decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (VOC 12.5).
Upstream startup example: version/datecode frame, reportType 0x00. No vocabulary measurement.

uplink.description: config response on fPort 7 is not a data report
uplink._note: Upstream ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7. fPort 7 carries config, not measurements.

uplink.description: 0x01 PM report has no climate/air-quality channel
uplink._note: Upstream PM1.0/PM2.5/PM10 example. The vocabulary models none of these (PM would be camelCase extras only); this codec scopes to climate/air-quality/wind/pressure, so the frame is reported as carrying no normalizable measurement.

uplink.description: 0x07 CO2 report with CO2 probe absent
uplink._note: Synthetic: CO2 channel 0xFFFF -> NoSensor; with no CO2 the air-quality frame has no measurement.
